name: Italian Vegetarian Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dry sherry or unsweetened Apple juice
2 Medium red or green bell peppers, seeded & chopped
4 oz (1 cup) Shredded low moisture part-skim Mozzarella cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 425°F.
2. Spray a 13 x 9-inch (3 quart) baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Cook lasagna noodles to desired doneness as directed on package. Drain; keep warm.
4. Meanwhile, bring sherry to a boil in a large nonstick skillet or Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Add mushrooms, zucchini, and bell peppers; cook 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add spinach, basil, and oregano; cook 2 minutes. Remove from heat and drain well.
7. In a medium bowl, combine ricotta cheese, cottage cheese, and Parmesan cheese until well blended.
8. Place 3 cooked lasagna noodles in the bottom of the spray-coated dish.
9. Top with 1/3 of the ricotta mixture and 1/3 of the vegetable mixture.
10. Repeat layering 2 more times.
11. Top with remaining 3 lasagna noodles, tomato sauce, and mozzarella cheese.
12. Cover dish tightly with sprayed foil.
13. Bake at 425°F for 25-30 minutes or until bubbly around edges. Remove foil and bake an additional 5 minutes or until top is light golden brown. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
